name: M:GTA.Game.FindPattern(System.String,System.IntPtr)
summary: Searches the address space of the current process for a memory pattern.
remarks: This function takes the Cheat Engine/IDA format ("48 8B 0D ?? ?? ? ? 44 8B C6 8B D5 8B D8" for example, where ?? and ? are wildcards).
returns: The address of a region matching the pattern, or

params.name: startAddress
params.description: The address to start searching at. If
